# GYEON Q2M PPF Wash 500ml

Price: €20.14 / 39.39лв.

Code: GYQ2MPPFWSH400

Weight: 0.650 Kgs

Gyeon Q²M PPF Wash is a pre-wash or basic wash shampoo designed to clean PPF or vinyl film in depth, but also safely. With this shampoo, in addition to the film, you will easily clean rims, sills and the overall paint surface.

Availability: In stock

Product Images:
- /userfiles/productlargeimages/product_3900.jpg

Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8MMQYpfvJSQ

## Detailed description

Gyeon Q²M PPF Wash is a 3-in-1 product – it will clean, dissolve all accumulated dirt and restore the original properties of PPF or vinyl film. It can be used as a pre-wash foam or a traditional shampoo for a basic wash. Gyeon Q²M PPF WASH is so effective in dissolving dirt that it washes away light deposits of iron dust and metal particles, thus saving you from having to work with a glue bar. Of course, all this happens completely safely for the film and all other exterior details. With this shampoo, in addition to the film, you will easily clean rims, sills and the entire paint surface.

How to Use:
Dissolve 20-30ml in a 6-7l bucket of water and treat with a microfiber glove.

## PPF Decon Wash

Q²M PPF WASH is an effective decontamination shampoo that can dissolve mild iron deposits from automotive film and paint without the need for claying. It is also slick and foamy, helping to prevent scratches during the washing stage on soft and delicate PPF.
It is also excellent for revitalizing PPF ceramic coatings by removing mild contaminants from the film and restoring water beading.

## Slick and Foamy

GYEON Q²M PPF Wash is a 3-in-1 product designed to clean, decontaminate, and restore the original properties of your PPF or vinyl film. It can be used as a foam or traditional shampoo, making it a versatile maintenance solution for your vehicle. While effectively removing metal contamination from polyurethane film, Q²M PPF Wash remains safe for use on all exterior surfaces. Its formula provides generous suds, ensuring a slick and smooth wash routine for the rest of your vehicle, whether coated or not.

## Description

Q²M PPF WASH is an effective decontamination shampoo that can remove iron deposit from any automotive film & paint without the need to clay.

AVAILABLE CAPACITIES: 400 ML / 1000 ML

## BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Q²M PPF WASH is great to use as a foaming agent not only on paint but also on wheels. Being super slick, it will allow a safe wash procedure of any type of wheels, coated or not.

CONCENTRATION: 1:500
CONSUMPTION: 20-30ml/ car
COATING SAFE: YES

## SAFE & SLICK

While being effective against metal contamination on polyurethane film, Q²M PPF Wash remains a safe shampoo on all exterior surfaces. Its formula ensures generous suds for a slick wash routine on the rest of your vehicle, coated or not.

## EASY TO USE

Q²M PPF Wash is a 3 in 1 product – it will clean, decontaminate & restore initial properties of your PPF or vinyl film. It might be used as foam or a traditional shampoo – make it a versatile maintenance solution for your vehicle.

## PRO TIPS

Q²M PPF WASH is excellent for use as a foaming agent, not only on paint but also on wheels. Its super slick formula ensures a safe wash procedure for all types of wheels, whether coated or not. It effectively removes mild iron and brake dust without damaging coatings. For heavy soiling, use with a foam cannon at a 1:5 ratio, and for general maintenance, use at a 1:10 ratio.

## FAQ

Is it more efficient than using a dedicated iron remover?
Using a dedicated iron remover will still be more effective. However, if you consistently use GYEON PPF Wash, there shouldn't be any heavy buildup of iron filings on your films. Occasionally, though, it's a good idea to treat the surface with a dedicated iron remover for a thorough (spring) cleaning.

What's the pH?
GYEON PPF Wash is considered pH neutral, with an approximate pH of around 6.5. A pH range of 6 to 8 has minimal effects on waxes, sealants, and coatings.

What's the dilution ratio for bucket wash?
Dilute 1:500, or about 20~30ml per bucket wash.

What's the dilution ratio for foam cannon?
Dilute 1:5 for heavy soiling and 1:10 for general maintenance.

Anything else I need to know?
Check out the video here (https://youtu.be/8MMQYpfvJSQ) to see it in action.

# Gyeon Q2M PPF Wash 500ml

Brand: GYEON

Price: $32.99 AUD (Tax included)

SKU: 116168

Product Image:
- https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116168.jpg

## Description

Q²M PPF WASH is an effective decontamination shampoo that can remove iron deposit from any automotive film & paint without the need to clay.

### Product Features and Benefits:

- Safe for use on all exterior surfaces
- Removes heavy contamination, such as insects, bird droppings, and grime
- Prepares the surface for a safe and effective wash
- Highly concentrated formula for economical use
- Does not contain any hazardous or aggressive chemicals

While being effective against metal contamination on polyurethane film, Q²M PPF Wash remains a safe shampoo on all exterior surfaces. Its formula ensures generous suds for a slick wash routine on the rest of your vehicle, coated or not.

Q²M PPF Wash is a 3 in 1 product - it will clean, decontaminate & restore initial properties of your PPF or vinyl film. It might be used as foam or a traditional shampoo - make it a versatile maintenance solution for your vehicle.

Use Gyeon Q²M PPF Wash at a rate of 500:1 (water:product) which is approx. 20-30ml in your 10L Wash Bucket. Wash your car using the Two Bucket Method with your favorite Gyeon Wash Mitt to wash, and a soft microfiber drying towel to dry.

CONCENTRATION: 1:500
Consumption: 20-30ml/ car
COATING SAFE: YES

## How to Use

### Step 1: Rinse the Vehicle
Rinse the vehicle with water to remove loose dirt and debris. This will help prevent scratching during the washing process.

### Step 2: Prepare the Shampoo Solution
Add 20ml of Gyeon Q2M PPF Wash to a bucket of warm water. Use a grit guard to prevent dirt and debris from being transferred back onto the surface of the vehicle. Q²M PPF Wash can be used in a foam lance too.

### Step 3: Wash the Vehicle
Using a quality wash mitt or sponge, wash the vehicle from top to bottom. Be sure to use a gentle touch and avoid applying too much pressure, as this can damage the PPF or vinyl wrap.

### Step 4: Rinse Thoroughly
Rinse the vehicle thoroughly with water to remove all traces of the shampoo solution. Be sure to rinse from top to bottom to avoid creating water spots.

### Step 5: Dry the Vehicle
Using a quality microfiber towel, dry the vehicle completely. Be sure to use a gentle touch and avoid applying too much pressure, as this can damage the PPF or vinyl wrap.
